query_normalized: predicting the impact of composition on the weibull modulus of ceramics materials science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) and (b) because it investigates the influence of a specific microstructural mechanism (dislocations) on the mechanical properties of ceramics, which is the fundamental physical basis for the Weibull modulus (a measure of strength variability).
